name: Coin Pusher World
short_description: Coin Pusher World is an interactive chat game designed for Twitch. Drop coins at the comfort of your own home, and share the experience with your viewers. Climb the leaderboards, earn tickets while playing to purchase custom coin skins and more! Have Fun & Happy Dropping!
detailed_description:
ATT: A Twitch Account is REQUIRED to play

Coin Pusher World is a chat interactive game, designed around an old arcade coin pusher machine. Created for streamers to enjoy with their viewers and friends!

Coin Pusher World is a game that brings the excitement of classic coin pusher machines to your stream. With realistic physics and colourful graphics, you'll feel like you're playing the real thing. If you love coin pushers, this game is for you!

With its engaging gameplay and realistic physics, Coin Pusher Casino is a must-play for fans of arcade and coin pusher games.

Timing the coin drop is the key in Coin Pusher World.

Purchase custom coin skins with tickets you win, change your coin skins and happy dropping!

Features:

■ Different Prizes to Earn Tickets and Points!

■ Many Different Pieces!

■ 2 Different Machine With Our DLC's!

■ Leaderboards!

■ Buy Custom Coin Skins Via Our Store with tickets you have earned or for IRL cash!

■ Customizable Machines

TWITCH ACCOUNT REQUIRED

If you experience any issues, need help setting up, or have questions, please visit the Discord
